summary: PR 2530 advances `src/melee/gr/granime.c` decompilation by implementing several previously stubbed or partially matched granime functions, tightening prototypes and struct fields, replacing raw assert expansions with HSD assert macros, and using inline wrapper/noinline call-shape helpers for matching. Bot evidence reports three new function matches and three improvements, plus a `.sdata` regression.

key_files.role: Main decompilation target; adds implementations and matching-oriented rewrites for granime animation traversal, varargs callback dispatch, archive animation lookup, and joint lookup/reset helpers.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gr/granime.c +294/-59, 20 hunks
raw_diff: implementations added for grAnime_801C752C, grAnime_801C7C1C, grAnime_801C8578; edits to grAnime_801C7228, grAnime_801C8138, grAnime_801C86D4, grAnime_801C8780

key_files.role: Header signature cleanup for recovered function types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C752C prototype changed from variadic-only to HSD_JObj*, s32, s32, void*, u32, ...
raw_diff: grAnime_801C8578 prototype changed from void*, void* to HSD_Joint*, s32*

key_files.role: Stage archive struct field recovery used by granime code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: UnkStageDat_x8_t padding at +4..+C replaced with HSD_AnimJoint** unk4, HSD_MatAnimJoint** unk8, HSD_ShapeAnimJoint** unkC

key_files.role: PR-local target list recording functions marked checked for this slice.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: new file lists grAnime_801C86D4, grAnime_801C84A4, grAnime_801C8578, grAnime_801C6A54, grAnime_801C752C, grAnime_801C6C0C, grAnime_801C7228, grAnime_801C7C1C

what_changed: Added full C bodies for `grAnime_801C752C`, `grAnime_801C7C1C`, and `grAnime_801C8578` where the diff previously showed `/// #...` stubs.
Improved `grAnime_801C7228` by factoring repeated JObj assert/aobj handling into `grAnime_801C6F50_wrapped` and by routing one texture-object traversal call through `grAnime_801C706C_noinline`.
Changed several raw `__assert` blocks in granime functions to `HSD_ASSERT` or `HSD_ASSERTREPORT` forms and added `baselib/debug.h` include.
Recovered typed fields in `UnkStageDat_x8_t` for animation joint pointer arrays and updated granime code to access `unk4`, `unk8`, and `unkC` instead of raw pointer arithmetic.
Updated `grAnime_801C752C` and `grAnime_801C8578` declarations in `granime.h` to match the recovered function bodies.
Replaced an existing `#pragma dont_inline` region around a call with static inline wrapper/noinline helper functions and added similar wrapper helpers for multiple granime callees.
Bot report says `grAnime_801C752C`, `grAnime_801C8578`, and `grAnime_801C86D4` became 100% matched; `grAnime_801C7C1C`, `grAnime_801C6A54`, and `grAnime_801C7228` improved; `.sdata` regressed.
smart_moves: Header signatures were updated alongside recovered function bodies rather than leaving broad `void*` or unstructured variadic declarations.
Archive member accesses were moved from byte-offset pointer arithmetic to typed struct fields after adding the corresponding fields to `types.h`.
Repeated assert expansions were mapped to project assert macros, reducing generated-looking source in touched functions.
The recursive joint search `grAnime_801C8578` uses the recovered `HSD_Joint*` and `s32* counter` roles, making the traversal logic clearer than the old `void*` prototype.
The varargs dispatcher in `grAnime_801C752C` groups `AOBJ_ARG_*` cases by expected argument payload and uses `va_arg` only for types that require a payload.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered body proves a function signature, update the owning header in the same PR slice.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `grAnime_801C752C` body takes `HSD_JObj*, s32, s32, void*, u32, ...`; `granime.h` prototype updated accordingly
raw_diff: `grAnime_801C8578` body takes `HSD_Joint*, s32*`; `granime.h` prototype updated accordingly
decomp_standards: truthful-headers-and-includes

decomp_lessons.lesson: Typed archive fields can remove raw offset loads once the struct layout is supported by local usage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `types.h` adds `unk4`, `unk8`, `unkC` fields to `UnkStageDat_x8_t`
raw_diff: `grAnime_801C8138` changes casts at offsets +0x4/+0x8/+0xC to `archive->unk4->unk8[arg1].unk4/unk8/unkC`
decomp_standards: typed-fields-over-pointer-math

decomp_lessons.lesson: Raw assert expansions in recovered code should be checked against local assert macros when line numbers and assert conditions are preserved.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `__assert("granime.c", 0x556, "archive")` replaced by `HSD_ASSERT(0x556, archive)`
raw_diff: `__assert("granime.c", 0x33A, "obj")` logic factored into `HSD_ASSERT(0x33A, obj)` within `grAnime_801C6F50_wrapped`
decomp_standards: assert-report-macros

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered pointer roles use local short names such as `jobj`, `robj`, `child`, `archive`, `joint`, `aj`, `mj`, and `sj` when the type or role is clear.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `grAnime_801C7C1C` locals include `archive`, `child`, `aj`, `mj`, `sj`, `caj`, `cmj`, `csj`
raw_diff: `grAnime_801C8578` signature uses `HSD_Joint* joint, s32* counter`

naming_conventions.convention: Unproven struct fields added in this slice retain address/offset-like names (`unk4`, `unk8`, `unkC`) rather than speculative semantic names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `UnkStageDat_x8_t` fields named `unk4`, `unk8`, `unkC` with typed pointer-array types

naming_conventions.convention: Matching helper wrappers in this slice use suffixes `_inner`, `_noinline`, and `_wrapped` to distinguish call-shape helpers from address-named decompiled functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: helpers such as `grAnime_801C67A8_inner`, `grAnime_801C67A8_noinline`, `grAnime_801C6F50_wrapped`

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Static inline wrapper chains were introduced to influence inlining/call shape while avoiding the previous broad pragma region.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed `#pragma push`, `#pragma dont_inline on`, and `#pragma pop` around `grAnime_801C67A8` call
raw_diff: added `_inner` and `_noinline` helper pairs for `grAnime_801C67A8`, `grAnime_801C683C`, `grAnime_801C6960`, `grAnime_801C69FC`, `grAnime_801C6A54`, and `grAnime_801C706C`
decomp_standards: avoid-pragmas-register-asm; matching-tactics-need-evidence

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Repeated JObj assertion/aobj flag handling was factored into an inline wrapper returning the `obj->flags & 0x4020` condition.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added `inline bool grAnime_801C6F50_wrapped(...)`
raw_diff: two repeated blocks in `grAnime_801C7228` replaced with calls to `grAnime_801C6F50_wrapped`

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Varargs matching in `grAnime_801C752C` uses a switch over `AOBJ_ARG_*` values and a `callbackArg` union-like local before dispatching to `grAnime_801C6F50` and recursive child handling.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `va_start(ap, type)`, `switch (type)`, `va_arg(ap, f64/void*/u32)`, `va_end(ap)` in `grAnime_801C752C`

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A temporary padded local struct in `grAnime_801C86D4` was replaced with scalar locals and a scoped root pointer before calling a noinline joint lookup helper.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: anonymous struct `sp` removed; scalar locals `sp2`, `sp3`, `sp`, `sp4` introduced
raw_diff: `joint = grAnime_801C8578_noinline(root, &sp)`

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: An existing `PAD_STACK(16)` in `grAnime_801C6A54` was removed while other wrapper tactics were used for call shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: deletion of `PAD_STACK(16);` from `grAnime_801C6A54`

review_feedback.feedback: Reported matched code increased by 1080 bytes (+0.03%); new 100% matches for `grAnime_801C752C`, `grAnime_801C8578`, and `grAnime_801C86D4`; improvements for `grAnime_801C7C1C`, `grAnime_801C6A54`, and `grAnime_801C7228`; one `.sdata` unmatched-item regression.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: issue_comment by decomp-dev[bot] at 2026-05-24T09:16:56Z

follow_up_queries: Later cleanup or removal of `grAnime_801C67A8_noinline` / `grAnime_801C6A54_noinline` wrappers
Later PRs resolving `.sdata` regression in `main/melee/gr/granime` after PR 2530
Later semantic renames for `UnkStageDat_x8_t` animation fields
Granime PRs converting raw `__assert` to `HSD_ASSERT` or `HSD_ASSERTREPORT`

notes: No human review comments are present in the loaded slice, so reviewer intent and acceptance rationale are not available.
The PR body is empty, so motivations for wrapper helpers, scalar local choices, and data-section tradeoffs must be inferred only from the diff and bot report.
Bot report provides concrete matching evidence for six functions and one `.sdata` regression, but it does not prove every changed helper or header/type edit was individually reviewed.
`target_funcs.txt` lists eight checked functions, while the bot report lists three new matches and three improvements; the slice does not provide validation detail for every listed target.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update headers when granime body recovery proves signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2530, recovered bodies for `grAnime_801C752C` and `grAnime_801C8578` were accompanied by more truthful prototypes in `src/melee/gr/granime.h`, replacing overly broad variadic/void-pointer declarations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `grAnime_801C752C` and `grAnime_801C8578` implementations and header prototype updates

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer typed stage archive fields over raw archive offset loads
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2530 typed `UnkStageDat_x8_t` fields at +4, +8, and +C as animation joint pointer arrays and updated granime code to use those fields instead of byte-offset casts.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `UnkStageDat_x8_t` field additions
raw_diff: `grAnime_801C8138` field access replacements

source_update_candidates.title: granime.c owns stage animation application helpers
source_update_candidates.text: `src/melee/gr/granime.c` contains stage animation helpers operating on `HSD_JObj`, `HSD_DObj`, `HSD_RObj`, `HSD_TObj`, `HSD_AObj`, and stage archive animation arrays. PR 2530 recovered or improved functions including `grAnime_801C752C`, `grAnime_801C7C1C`, `grAnime_801C8578`, and `grAnime_801C86D4`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: granime function implementations and helper edits
text_corpus: bot report for `main/melee/gr/granime`
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-level context for future granime matching work; should be curated as a path fact rather than inferred globally.

source_update_candidates.title: Candidate meaning for UnkStageDat_x8_t +4/+8/+C fields
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2530 changed `UnkStageDat_x8_t` offsets +4, +8, and +C from padding to `HSD_AnimJoint** unk4`, `HSD_MatAnimJoint** unk8`, and `HSD_ShapeAnimJoint** unkC`, and granime code indexes these arrays by animation/map arguments.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `types.h` field additions
raw_diff: `grAnime_801C7C1C` and `grAnime_801C8138` use `archive->unk4->unk8[map_id].unk4/unk8/unkC`
source_update_candidates.reason: The diff supports typed field roles, but semantic field names remain `unk*`; curator may decide whether a data-sheet/type note is warranted.

source_update_candidates.title: Inline noinline-wrapper tactic needs explicit narrow evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2530 used `_inner`/`_noinline` static inline wrapper chains to replace a previous `#pragma dont_inline` block and to steer calls in granime. This aligns with treating inlining-control tactics as narrow matching tactics that need bot/objdiff evidence and later cleanup review.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removal of `#pragma dont_inline` around `grAnime_801C67A8` call
raw_diff: added multiple `_inner` and `_noinline` wrappers
text_corpus: bot match report with function improvements and `.sdata` regression
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards already cover matching tactics and pragma avoidance; curator may add this PR as an example rather than a new rule.

rejection_notes: Do not treat the `_noinline` wrapper pattern as broadly accepted style from this PR alone; evidence only shows it was used in this granime slice with bot match output.
Do not claim all eight functions in `target_funcs.txt` newly matched; the bot report specifically lists three new 100% matches and three improvements.
Do not ignore the bot-reported `.sdata` regression; the slice does not explain whether it was accepted as a deliberate tradeoff.
Do not assign semantic names to `UnkStageDat_x8_t.unk4/unk8/unkC` beyond their typed pointer-array roles without later evidence.
